summary: Comprehensive testing of GCAAN Arabic mobile app (Expo web preview + FastAPI + MongoDB). Backend: 29/29 pytest tests PASSED (100%) covering auth, JWT, RBAC, department/division/user hierarchy, full 4-stage activity approval workflow (pending_division → pending_department → pending_gm → approved), report endpoints, and _id exclusion. Frontend: RTL Arabic UI renders correctly with GCAAN logo, designer credit 'تصميم المهندس معاد كاظم'; admin login → home tab succeeds; home shows KPI cards, role badge (المدير العام), and GM quick actions (Approvals, Departments, Users, Reports, KPI); /departments allows adding new department via testIDs new-dept-input + add-dept-btn (verified list grows from 6→7); /users shows all users grouped by role; activities tab shows status chips + activity with approved badge; reports tab shows weekly/monthly/by-dept/completion tabs with real data; profile shows user info and logout works (returns to /login). No deprecated Expo packages detected. No blocking issues.

minor.issue: Returns HTTP 200 for resource creation; convention prefers 201 Created.
Any authenticated user (including employees) can list all departments. Consider scoping if privacy is a concern.

issues: React Native web deprecation warnings in console: 'shadow*' style props (use boxShadow) and 'props.pointerEvents' (use style.pointerEvents). Non-blocking but should be migrated for future RN versions.

action_items: (Optional) Return HTTP 201 for POST resource creation endpoints (departments, divisions, users, activities).
(Optional) Silence RN-Web deprecation warnings by migrating shadow* → boxShadow and pointerEvents prop → style.pointerEvents.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 572 LOC; still manageable but consider splitting into routers (auth, users, activities, reports) if it grows further.
All endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id and hashed_password from responses — verified via tests.
JWT auth, role-based guards, and hierarchy checks are well implemented and enforced (verified with 403 tests for every wrong-role transition).
Frontend uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL correctly with no hardcoded URLs.
All screens use React Native primitives (View/Text/TouchableOpacity/TextInput) with StyleSheet — no HTML tags or CSS files.
testID attributes present on all key interactive elements.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of tested flows (login, nav, departments add, users list, activities list, reports tabs, profile, logout)

seed_data_creation: Created 1 TEST department (TEST_dept_*), 1 dept_manager (TEST_dm_*), 1 division (TEST_div_*), 1 division_manager (TEST_divm_*), 1 employee (TEST_emp_*), 1 activity that was approved through the full chain, and 1 UI-created department 'قسم اختبار UI'. Data left in DB for main-agent verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints validated. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_gcaan_backend.py is idempotent (uses uuid-suffixed TEST_ names). Rerun with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_gcaan_backend.py -v. TEST users persist so re-running is safe. Frontend testIDs used: login-username-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button, new-dept-input, add-dept-btn, logout-button. Verified logout via [data-testid=logout-button].
rca_of_issue: N/A — MVP is functioning end-to-end. All 4-stage activity approval workflow verified end-to-end via automated tests including all 403 permission edge cases.
